optimized_random_forest.model:
CalibratedClassifierCV(cv=3,
                       estimator=RandomForestClassifier(class_weight='balanced',
                                                        max_depth=10,
                                                        min_samples_leaf=6,
                                                        min_samples_split=12,
                                                        n_estimators=300,
                                                        n_jobs=-1,
                                                        random_state=42),
                       method='isotonic')

voting_ensemble.model:
CalibratedClassifierCV(cv=3,
                       estimator=VotingClassifier(estimators=[('rf',
                                                               RandomForestClassifier(class_weight='balanced',
                                                                                      max_depth=10,
                                                                                      min_samples_leaf=6,
                                                                                      min_samples_split=12,
                                                                                      n_estimators=300,
                                                                                      n_jobs=-1,
                                                                                      random_state=42)),
                                                              ('gb',
                                                               GradientBoostingClassifier(max_depth=6,
                                                                                          n_estimators=200,
                                                                                          random_state=42,
                                                                                          subsample=0.8))],
                                                  voting='soft'),
                       method='isotonic')
